channel.title: Blue Puppet's Garden
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Blue Puppet's Garden

item.title: Home
item.description: Obsidian Vault Welcome to my digital garden. Topics Chinese Systemd Machine Learning Anime .

item.title: Black Swan: Obsession and the Price of Perfection
item.description: Black Swan: Obsession and the Price of Perfection Context Related: 7hjk_kon_cycle Prerequisites: None — start here Next: 7hjk_kon_cycle Black Swan is a 2010 American psychological horror-thriller film directed by Darren Aronofsky, starring Natalie Portman, Mila Kunis, and Vincent Cassel.

item.title: Magnetic Rose: Haunting Memories of Love and Loss
item.description: Magnetic Rose: Haunting Memories of Love and Loss Context Related: 7hjk_kon_cycle Prerequisites: None — start here Next: 7hjk_kon_cycle Magnetic Rose is a 1995 science fiction horror short film, the first of three shorts comprising Katsuhiro Otomo’s anthology film Memories (based on stories by Otomo...

item.title: Satoshi Kon & Psychological Horror: Connected Works
item.description: Satoshi Kon & Psychological Horror: Connected Works Context Related: k9p2_perfect_blue p6m7_paprika 2q1n_black_swan 8xhr_paranoia_agent 3t4g_magnetic_rose Prerequisites: None — start here Next: None (standalone) This map connects the major works exploring psychological reality-collapse, identity...

item.title: Paranoia Agent: Society's Collective Nervous Breakdown
item.description: Paranoia Agent: Society’s Collective Nervous Breakdown Context Related: 7hjk_kon_cycle Prerequisites: None — start here Next: 7hjk_kon_cycle Paranoia Agent is a 2004 Japanese psychological thriller anime television series created and directed by Satoshi Kon, who wrote and directed every episode.

item.title: Perfect Blue: A Masterpiece of Psychological Horror and Identity
item.description: Perfect Blue: A Masterpiece of Psychological Horror and Identity Context Related: 7hjk_kon_cycle Prerequisites: None — start here Next: 7hjk_kon_cycle Perfect Blue is a 1997 Japanese animated psychological horror film directed by Satoshi Kon, based on the novel “Perfect Blue: Complete Metamorphosis”...

item.title: Paprika: Dreams Colliding with Reality
item.description: Paprika: Dreams Colliding with Reality Context Related: 7hjk_kon_cycle Prerequisites: None — start here Next: 7hjk_kon_cycle Paprika is a 2006 Japanese animated science fiction psychological thriller film directed by Satoshi Kon, based on the 1993 novel by Yasutaka Tsutsui.

item.title: Compartmentalization (Psychology)
item.description: Context Understanding how the mind separates thoughts, emotions, and tasks to maintain mental health and efficiency.

item.title: Move Semantics
item.description: Context Transferring resources from one object to another without deep copying — “pilfering” pointers, buffers, file handles.

item.title: Template Metaprogramming (TMP)
item.description: Context Using templates to compute types and values at compile time. Turing-complete.
